replacements.Generate shell completion script: 生成 Shell 补全脚本
replacements.Shell to generate completion for (defaul: 要生成补全的 Shell（默认：zsh）
replacements.Install completion script to shell profi: 将补全脚本安装到 Shell 配置文件
replacements.Write completion scripts to $OPENCLAW_ST: 将补全脚本写入 $OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/completions（不输出到 stdout）
replacements.Automated installation not supported for: 暂不支持为 ${shell} 自动安装补全。
replacements.Completion cache not found at ${cachePat: 未在 ${cachePath} 找到补全缓存。请先运行 \`${binName} completion --write-state\`。
replacements.Profile not found at ${profilePath}. Cre: 未找到配置文件 ${profilePath}。已创建新文件。
replacements.Completion installed. Restart your shell: 补全已安装。请重启 Shell，或运行：source ${profilePath}
replacements.Failed to install completion: ${err as s: 安装补全失败：${err as string}
